public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as shrine caretaker.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Speaks with ritual calm and practiced reassurance, but watches closely for signs of spiritual or civic disturbance. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a shrine caretaker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of shrine caretaker in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of shrine caretaker while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must hold ritual legitimacy, public comfort, and doctrinal integrity together without letting strain become visible too early. Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of shrine caretaker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Dema Forgebound needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Soreheim Proper.
Dema Forgebound may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Dema Forgebound immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Soreheim Proper, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Giant Council, Cloud Giant governance cadres.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
